hooks.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $b = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $b.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $b.BalloonTipIcon = 'Info'; $b.BalloonTipText = 'Claude Code 응답 완료'; $b.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; $b.Visible = $true; $b.ShowBalloonTip(3000); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1; $b.Dispose()
